mean_en: buildings, services, equipment, etc. that are provided for a particular purpose; a special feature of a machine, service, etc. that makes it possible to do something extra
sentence: The facility is so popular that it attracts many visitors.
sentence_trans: 这个设施非常受欢迎，吸引了许多人前来打卡。
word_etyma: facile简单的 + ity表名词 → 促进事务简化的设施或工具  → facility设施，设备
